title: 英伟达和现代深化联合进军人工智能驱动的机器人领域

title: Uber 在 Wayve Robotaxis 推出前在伦敦设立候补名单
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has set up a waitlist for customers interested in riding in a robotaxi in London, ahead of a planned commercial debut in the UK this year.（原题：Uber Opens London Waitlist for Wayve Robotaxis Ahead of Launch）

title: Uber 告诉伦敦为机器人出租车做好准备
summary: Uber is getting ready to put robotaxis on London's streets, opening an interest list for riders who want to be among the first to hail one of Wayve's autonomous vehicles when the service goes live later this year. The rollout would be a milestone in one of Uber's biggest markets and an early test of […]（原题：Uber tells London to get ready for robotaxis）

title: 机器人可以增强制造业工人而不是取代他们
summary: With the right AI, teleoperation, and safeguards, robotics can augment manufacturing opportunities, says one to ONE Holdings' president.
